subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the sacred Threshold! It is possible, nay most easy, to please God, for if only one is pure in heart
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس رضای حق ممکن الحصول است بلکه بنهایت آسانی بمجرد خلوص رضای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @attaining good pleasure of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
